author: doll-agent
content: Phase 0 complete. Deliverables: ferray-python/ crate (cdylib, wheel-only, maturin build backend), pyproject.toml + python/ferray/__init__.py facade, src/lib.rs with #[pymodule] fn _ferray exposing zeros/ones/arange/dtype/__version__, dtype-dispatch macro pattern that scales to all 11 supported dtypes (bool, i8/16/32/64, u8/16/32/64, f32/64), tests/test_phase0.py with 26 passing tests verifying NumPy round-trip + numeric parity. cargo clippy clean. Closes #685.
